summary: Iteration 18: Agency Admin Mobile App fully tested. ALL features working correctly. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All 5 tabs functional, login redirects work correctly, client nav bar HIDDEN (bug from iteration_17 is FIXED).

client_nav_bar_hidden.details: Client navigation bar (LogiRent, Accueil, Véhicules, Locations, Profil + FR/EN) is HIDDEN on /agency-app routes. Bug from iteration_17 is FIXED.

agency_app_dashboard.details: Dashboard shows LogiRent header, LogiRent Lausanne badge, stats (0 for new agency - expected), 'Nouvelle réservation' button, 'Dernières réservations' section

agency_app_bottom_tabs.details: All 5 bottom tabs visible and navigate correctly

booking_flow_client_search.details: Search for 'jean' returns 3 matching clients: Dupont, Jean Dupont, Jean Testeur

booking_flow_quick_create.details: 'Créer un nouveau client' expands form with Nom*, Téléphone, Email fields and 'Créer et continuer' button

clients_tab_list.details: Shows 'Aucun client' empty state (expected for agency-scoped view). Has search input.

clients_tab_new_client_modal.details: Purple add button opens 'Nouveau client' modal with Nom*, Téléphone (+41 XX XXX XX XX), Email fields and 'Créer le client' button

vehicles_tab.details: Shows 'Aucun véhicule' (Lausanne has 0 vehicles - expected). Search bar present.

reservations_tab.details: Shows 'Aucune réservation' (expected). Status filter chips visible: Toutes, En attente, Espèces, Confirmées, Actives, Terminées, Annulées

api_admin_login.details: POST /api/auth/login returns correct role (admin vs super_admin)

api_quick_client.details: POST /api/admin/quick-client creates client correctly. Returns existing client if email matches.

api_search_clients.details: GET /api/admin/search-clients?q=jean returns matching clients. Short queries (<2 chars) return empty.

api_available_vehicles.details: GET /api/admin/available-vehicles returns vehicles for given dates scoped by agency (0 for Lausanne - expected)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed quick clients via API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agency Admin Mobile App is fully functional. The bug from iteration_17 (client nav bar showing on agency-app) is FIXED. All 5 bottom tabs work: Accueil (dashboard), Réserver (booking flow), Réservations (list with filters), Véhicules (list), Clients (list with modal). Login redirects work: admin→/agency-app, super_admin→/super-admin. Lausanne agency has 0 vehicles/reservations which is expected behavior.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. The client nav bar visibility bug from iteration_17 has been fixed by the main agent. The isAdmin check in _layout.tsx line 87 now properly hides TopNavBar for admin users on /agency-app routes.
